identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.core_principle: Fusion of Ancient Wisdom and Modern Precision. No generic 'purple space' apps. We use Parchment, Gold, and Deep Earth.

typography.installation: Import via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;700&family=DM+Sans:opsz,wght@9..40,400;500;700&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&display=swap');

usage_rules: Use Textures! Dark mode background should feel like 'Obsidian' or 'Dark Espresso'.
Gold should be used for Borders, Icons, and Active States.
Mustard is for Highlights and Call-to-Actions.

layout.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-8 or p-12 for main containers. Gap-6 for grids.
layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris). Mix wide cards (2x1) with tall cards (1x2) and standard squares (1x1).
layout.containers: Rounded-none or Rounded-sm (max 4px). Sharp corners feel more 'Cards/Tarot'.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-border. On hover: border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-500.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-[0_4px_20px_-2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] for light mode. Glow effects for dark mode.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80 for sticky headers.
visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle noise texture overlay with `pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 opacity-[0.03] z-50`.

required_interactions: Zodiac Sign Selection: Must scale up and glow on hover.
Page Transition: Fade in + Slide Up.
Card Hover: Subtle lift (-2px) and border gold glow.

ZodiacSelector.description: A circular or grid layout of 12 signs. Use massive Typography (Unicode Symbols) instead of cheap icons. Font: Playfair Display. Size: 9xl.
ZodiacSelector.instructions: Allow user to click a sign. Store selection in Context/LocalStorage.

HoroscopeCard.description: The main reading display. Looks like a tarot card or parchment.
HoroscopeCard.visuals: Border-gold/20. Background-card. Serif typography for the reading text.

ThemeToggle.description: A mystical toggle. Sun icon for Light, Moon for Dark. Position: Top Right Fixed.

Dashboard.description: The Bento Grid containing Daily, Weekly, Monthly tabs and other widgets (Lucky Number, Mood, etc.).

images.description: Dark starry texture for Dark Mode background
Moon and Stars for Landing Page Hero
Gold Sun Bust for Daily Horoscope Card Background (opacity 10%)

universal_guidelines: DATA-TESTID: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'sign-aries', 'theme-toggle').
NO DEFAULT BLUE: Override all blue focus rings with Gold/Mustard rings.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast in both themes. Use the provided colors.
AI CONTENT: The horoscope text comes from the backend. Handle 'Loading' states with a mystical 'Reading the stars...' animation, not a generic spinner.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE tailwind.config.js to use the 'Alchemist' palette provided above.
2. UPDATE index.css to import the Fonts and set the CSS variables for Light/Dark modes.
3. CREATE the ZodiacSelector component first. It's the entry point.
4. USE Typography (Unicode ♈ ♉ etc.) for signs. Do not fetch external icons for signs unless necessary.
